title: We are witnessing history in stock market, that is not a good thing: Michael Burry warns of major Nasdaq reversal
description: Michael Burry joins a growing list of market observers expressing concerns over the rally fuelled by artificial intelligence-related spending from major technology companies such as Alphabet and Amazon.
content:
Investor Michael Burry, best known for predicting the 2008 financial crisis and portrayed in The Big Short, has warned that the Nasdaq 100 could be headed for a sharp reversal after what he described as a “parabolic” rally in technology stocks.

title: AI's Influence: A Global Shift in Stock Market Dynamics
description: The acceleration of artificial intelligence is contributing to unprecedented stock market concentration across the globe. The dominance of tech giants in market indices raises both opportunities and concerns, particularly as investors rely on a narrow range of stocks, which may amplify market shifts depending on the performance of new technologies.
content: The rapid rise of artificial intelligence is reshaping global stock markets, with tech behemoths driving an unprecedented concentration of market value. Not only are U.S. tech giants like Nvidia and Alphabet dominating, but the trend extends globally... [655 chars]

title: Record $25 Million Spent on Ads in Rep. Massie's Primary
description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., and his challenger, former Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein, are airing competing artificial intelligence-generated ads.
